{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201505022AF9F4FEF77136232917\"}"},"total":306},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7383620514554659608","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者也太有才，主人公的婚姻竟可以这样来操作。再次为你点赞👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719134752,"group_id":"7110430021407214631","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2937539844389368"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7110430021407214631","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"720"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读68小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3043,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":243049,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7383618263865262872","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此文写的太好了为作者点赞👍。主人公太厉害了简直就是个全能者，而且还那么低调。用马不停蹄来形容他的生活节奏真的一点都不夸张，无论是服役还是退役只要国家召唤他必回，而且战必胜，他为了国家和人民的利益从不计较个人得失无怨无悔，他为了传承和弘扬中医创建了免费的中医学校，为了贫困地区的儿童有学上他建了十所小学，他为国家为人民做出的贡献太多太多了…向敬爱的人民子弟兵致敬！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719134289,"group_id":"7110430021407214631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+iBcH85xy5lCrPW2Ciw7mzITnDIyv/xN0ov7oAzows5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776529650\u0026x-signature=hnlAaND2JahZJ5YIbXdCK72Bw34%3D","user_id":"2937539844389368","user_name":"喜欢水龟属的小果"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"29375398
